nodalDepartmentName.label: Labour and Employment Department, Himachal Pradesh

schemeContent.briefDescription: The "Widow Pension Scheme" launched by HPBOCWWB is designed to support widows of registered beneficiaries. Through this initiative, the Board will disburse a monthly amount of ₹1,500/- to help widows manage their expenses and improve their quality of life.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The "Widow Pension Scheme" launched by the Himachal Pradesh Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HPBOCWWB) is designed to support widows of registered beneficiaries. Through this initiative, the Board will disburse a monthly amount of ₹1,500/- to help widows manage their expenses and improve their quality of life.

children.text: The "Widow Pension Scheme" launched by the Himachal Pradesh Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HPBOCWWB) is designed to support widows of registered beneficiaries. Through this initiative, the Board will disburse a monthly amount of ₹1,500/- to help widows manage their expenses and improve their quality of life.

applicationProcess.process_md:
**Scheme Application Process:** **Step 1:** The applicant must visit the [official website](https://bocw.hp.nic.in/index.aspx) of the Himachal Pradesh Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board. **Step 2:** Click on the option "[Apply for Benefits.](https://bocw.hp.nic.in/PublicPages/ApplyForSchemes.aspx)" **Step 3:** Enter your beneficiary details and date of birth, then click "Search" to view your information. **Step 4:** Select the scheme you wish to apply for to avail of the benefits. **Step 5:** Enter all required information and upload the necessary documents as prompted. **Step 6:** Finally, click on "Submit Application" to complete the process.
**Application Tracking:** Applicants can track their application status online through the[ official website](https://bocw.hp.nic.in/index.aspx) of the Himachal Pradesh Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board. Relevant updates will be sent to the registered mobile number.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The applicant should be the widow of a deceased construction worker.
1. The deceased worker should have been registered with the Himachal Pradesh Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HPBOCWWB).
1. The deceased worker should have maintained regular membership with the Board.

children.text: The applicant should be the widow of a deceased construction worker.
The deceased worker should have been registered with the Himachal Pradesh Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HPBOCWWB).
The deceased worker should have maintained regular membership with the Board.
